footer.tagline: An institute dedicated to SAP Finance training, to the upskilling of professionals and to supporting enterprises through their transformation and adoption challenges.

home.title_a: Train, transform and deliver impact across
home.lede: We train SAP Finance professionals, support enterprises through their transformations and prepare Key Users to secure the adoption of new processes.
home.positioning_title_a: Three areas of expertise, one focus:
home.positioning_lede: We work exclusively in SAP Finance. Across every transformation and every upskilling journey, we connect business processes, their translation into SAP and team adoption.
home.pillar_1_text: Structured programs for consultants, experts and finance profiles seeking to strengthen their operational mastery of processes and how they are run inside SAP.
home.pillar_2_text: Advisory support for enterprises navigating their alignment, organization, adoption and efficiency challenges across SAP Finance transformations.
home.pillar_3_text: Programs designed to prepare key users, strengthen their autonomy and secure the adoption of new processes.
home.offer_1_text: For consultants, experts and finance profiles seeking to strengthen their operational command and progress on concrete SAP Finance challenges.
home.offer_2_text: For finance leaders and teams engaged in a SAP transformation: scoping, business–system alignment and change management support.
home.offer_3_text: Prepare your key users, structure their upskilling and secure adoption from the moment of deployment.
home.why_text: Our programs and engagements are built on a simple conviction: real expertise is built from the field, from real cases and from a fine-grained mastery of processes. No abstract theory, no generic playbooks.
home.why_2: Real cases drawn from live projects
home.audience_title: Built for SAP professionals and leaders driving transformation.
home.aud_1_desc: To strengthen your operational command of finance processes.
home.aud_2_desc: To structure your trajectory and grow into senior positions.
home.aud_3_desc: To gain autonomy before and after deployment.
home.aud_4_desc: To steer a SAP Finance transformation with greater alignment and clarity.
home.aud_5_desc: To align business, system and adoption.
home.aud_6_desc: To structure upskilling around SAP Finance.
home.corp_title: Two packs to structure your SAP Finance programs.
home.corp_lede: Whether you are launching a transformation, preparing a deployment or strengthening team adoption, our two enterprise packs cover scoping, adoption and upskilling.
home.corp_p1_text: Scoping, business–configuration alignment and project advisory for finance leaders and teams engaged in a SAP transformation.
home.corp_p2_text: Preparation of business relays, knowledge transfer and adoption security from the moment of deployment.
home.digital_title: Premium content to structure your SAP Finance challenges.
home.digital_lede: Expert guides, frameworks, templates and premium playbooks designed to deepen a topic, structure an approach and equip SAP Finance professionals.
home.refs_lede: Our experts have contributed to SAP Finance programs within leading French and international groups, in demanding contexts with high-stakes outcomes.
home.refs_disclaimer: These references illustrate the experience of our experts within major groups; they do not imply a direct commercial relationship or formal endorsement.
home.final_title: Let's discuss your SAP Finance needs.
home.final_lede: Whether you are looking for a training program, enterprise advisory or a Key User initiative, we respond with a clear, concrete first read of your needs.

seo.contact_desc: Let's discuss your SAP Finance, transformation or training needs. Confidential exchange, no cold outreach.
